github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text:
Generate a commit message. Strictly adheres to Conventional Commits.

Structure
<type>(<scope>): <subject>

<body>

Requirements

* Type: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore.
* Subject: Use imperative mood (e.g., "Add" not "Added"), start uncapitalized, do not end with a period, limit to 50 characters.
* Body: Separate from subject with a blank line. Explain *what* and *why*, not *how*. Body's lines must not be longer than 100 characters.
* Breaking Changes: Indicate with ! after type and BREAKING CHANGE: footer.
